rationale: The one substantive ground-truth concern (reviewer questioning why the test's device_communicator/reduce_scatter assertions don't cover _TP, which was also converted to init_vllm_model_parallel_group) is caught explicitly and precisely by X, with a concrete fix suggestion; Y misses it entirely and recommends APPROVE. X's other findings (stale comment after the cfg_parallel_size>1 guard was dropped, missing docstring, unguarded cpu_group access) are all grounded in the actual diff, though some are repetitive/low-value nitpicks. Y's review is well-reasoned on correctness but surfaces almost no actionable findings, offering only one vague non-blocking comment.
